questionHtml:
Given equimolar concentrations, which substance would produce the strongest signal in a 1H NMR spectrum?


A.  (CH3)3CH

B.  C6H6

C.  C8H18

D.  Si(CH3)4

meta.title: Given equimolar concentrations, which substance would produce the strongest signal in a 1H NMR spectrum? A. (CH3)3CH B. C6H6 C. C8H18 D. Si(CH3)4
